zh.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron是John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron和Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay的兒子，於1390年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯。他於1410年與Isabel Drummond在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾笛卡爾 斯康斯康 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Allan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , used mainly in Scotland and North America.

en.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron was born in 1390, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland as the son of John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron and Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay. He married Isabel Drummond in 1410, in Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron est né en 1390, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, fils de John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron et Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay. Il a épousé Isabel Drummond en 1410, à Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron wurde 1390 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, als Sohn von John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron und Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay geboren. Er hat 1410 in Inverness-shire, Scotland Isabel Drummond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1449 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron è nato il nel 1390 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland come figlio di John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron e Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay. Lui sposato Isabel Drummond nel 1410, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameronは1390年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでJohn Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan CameronとAnn McMartin of Letterfinlayの息子として生まれた。1410年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアでIsabel Drummondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年に故郷で59歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアオルド スコンスコン プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Sco: 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘 스콘 플리오리
ko.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 1390년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron(와)과 Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1410년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Isabel Drummond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘 스콘 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron nasceu em 1390, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland filho de John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron e Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay. Ele casou-se com Isabel Drummond em 1410, em Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Sco: скоун приори, олд скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия
ru.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron родился в 1390 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron и Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Drummond в 1410 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности скоун приори, олд скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron nació en 1390, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland como hijo de John Ochtery Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron y Ann McMartin of Letterfinlay. Se casó con Isabel Drummond en 1410, en Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1449, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.
